title: rinorea lanceolata
intro: Rinorea lanceolata, also known as the heartleaf or lance-leafed Rinorea, is a plant species belonging to the family Violaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving circulation. Rinorea lanceolata can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cultures, it is also used as a poultice or applied topically to affected areas.
